message:
Fix edge cases in UI components

InstallSkillButton.tsx:
- Add MAX_DELIMITER_ATTEMPTS (100) limit to prevent potential infinite loop
  when generating unique heredoc delimiters
- Add random timestamp-based fallback delimiter if max attempts exhausted
- Prevents theoretical DOS if content contains many JFP_SKILL_N patterns

bottom-sheet.tsx:
- Fix body overflow management when multiple sheets are open
- Use module-level openSheetCount to track number of open sheets
- Only set overflow: hidden on first sheet open
- Only restore overflow when all sheets are closed
- Prevents scroll restoration issues with nested/concurrent sheets

toast.tsx:
- Guard against negative timeout when duration < 300ms
- Use Math.max(0, duration - 300) for exit delay calculation
- Prevents unexpected behavior with very short toast durations

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
